title: More Nonsense Limerick 3
content:
There was an old person of Minety,
    Who purchased five hundred and ninety
    Large apples and pears, 
    Which he threw unawares
    At the heads of the people of Minety.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 3"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
